project.name: AEM Loki Integrator - Core Bundle
project.description: OSGi bundle that attaches the Loki (loki4j) appender to AEM's Logback LoggerContext programmatically via SLF4J + reflection. The bundle has no compile-time dependency on Logback internals, so AEMaaCS Code Quality rule S1874 has nothing to flag. All appender and logger settings come from a single OSGi configuration.

configuration.bnd:
Bundle-SymbolicName: ${project.artifactId} Bundle-Name: ${project.name} Bundle-Version: ${project.version}
# This bundle uses ONLY SLF4J + reflection to talk to Logback. We must not # advertise any ch.qos.logback.* or org.apache.sling.commons.log.logback # package in Import-Package, both because we have no compile-time dependency # on them and because AEMaaCS Code Quality rule S1874 flags those headers # as a vulnerability. Import-Package: !ch.qos.logback.*,\ !org.apache.sling.commons.log.logback.*,\ !com.github.loki4j.*,\ *
